solution.notes: Learner should import math, read a positive number from input, and print its square, cube, and square root in clear sentences using ** and math.sqrt.

practices.title: Mission: Rounding-Gym - round, floor und ceil

solution.notes: Learner should import math, read a decimal number, and print the rounded, floored, and ceiled versions using round, math.floor, and math.ceil.
Learner should import random, ask how many times to roll, use random.randint(1, 6) in a loop, and print each roll plus a final total sum.

Learner should import random, pick a secret number with random.randint(1, 50), loop asking for guesses until correct, and after wrong guesses print whether it is too high/low and how far away using abs(secret - guess).
